modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't view images in Xtender with over 100 pages attached.

full_description_text:  
So, the user is looking at a document in Banner.  
It has more than 100 pages attached.  
They can't see the pages above 100 in Xtender.  
They need help figuring this out.
